# Atelier Minimal

> A stripped-down design system fixture for testing. Matches the real atelier
> structure but with minimal tokens for fast test runs.

## 1. Identity

- **Name:** Atelier Minimal
- **Role:** Test fixture for emdesign surface tests
- **Tone:** Neutral, functional

## 2. Color

- `--color-accent`: #4F46E5 (Indigo)
- `--color-surface`: #FFFFFF
- `--color-text`: #111827
- `--color-muted`: #6B7280
- `--color-border`: #E5E7EB

## 3. Typography

- `--font-display`: Inter
- `--font-body`: Inter
- `--font-mono`: JetBrains Mono

## 4. Spacing

- `--space-xs`: 4px
- `--space-sm`: 8px
- `--space-md`: 16px
- `--space-lg`: 24px
- `--space-xl`: 32px

## 5. Shape

- `--radius-sm`: 4px
- `--radius-md`: 8px
- `--radius-lg`: 12px

## 6. Depth

- `--shadow-sm`: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05)
- `--shadow-md`: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)
- `--shadow-lg`: 0 10px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)

## 7. Motion

- `--duration-fast`: 150ms
- `--duration-normal`: 250ms
- `--easing-default`: ease-in-out
